personality_traits_system.description: Quantifiable personality traits system for actorial digital personage models

intelligence.name: Intelligence
intelligence.description: Problem-solving ability, analytical thinking, cognitive capacity

innovation.name: Innovation
innovation.description: Creative thinking, breakthrough solutions, novel approaches

leadership.name: Leadership
leadership.description: Team influence, decision-making authority, inspirational capability

risk_tolerance.name: Risk Tolerance
risk_tolerance.description: Willingness to take calculated risks, comfort with uncertainty

technical_skill.name: Technical Skill
technical_skill.description: Technical expertise, engineering capability, technical depth

charisma.name: Charisma
charisma.description: Personal magnetism, influence, charm, communication effectiveness

strategic_vision.name: Strategic Vision
strategic_vision.description: Long-term planning, strategic thinking, vision setting

perfectionism.name: Perfectionism
perfectionism.description: Attention to detail, quality standards, @PEAK performance

philanthropy.name: Philanthropy
philanthropy.description: Giving back, social responsibility, community impact

engineering.name: Engineering
engineering.description: Engineering capability, design skills, technical implementation

problem_solving.name: Problem Solving
problem_solving.description: Ability to solve complex problems, analytical approach

team_inspiration.name: Team Inspiration
team_inspiration.description: Ability to inspire and motivate teams, team building

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.description: Ability to adapt to change, flexibility, resilience

patience.name: Patience
patience.description: Ability to wait, long-term perspective, tolerance for delays

humor.name: Humor
humor.description: Sense of humor, wit, ability to lighten situations

strategy.name: Strategy
strategy.description: Strategic planning, tactical thinking, long-term vision

discipline.name: Discipline
discipline.description: Adherence to principles, self-control, structured approach

balance.name: Balance
balance.description: Consideration of all perspectives, balanced decision-making

decisiveness.name: Decisiveness
decisiveness.description: Speed of decision-making, clarity of choices, action orientation

mentoring.name: Mentoring
mentoring.description: Teaching ability, guidance quality, knowledge transfer

philosophy.name: Philosophy
philosophy.description: Deep thinking, philosophical depth, abstract reasoning

protection.name: Protection
protection.description: Safeguarding values, protective instincts, defense capability

tensions.description: High risk tolerance may conflict with strict discipline
